channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: Bitcoin developer Jameson Lopp says it's better to freeze 5.6 million BTC than let hackers have them
item.description: Lopp says dormant coins could pose systemic risk if quantum computing gives attackers the ability to grab them, intensifying the growing “freeze or not freeze” debate....
item.dc:creator: Coindesk

item.dc:creator: Coindesk

item.title: Prepping for 'Q-Day': Why Quantum Risk Management Should Start Now
item.description: Quantum computers are coming and may impact systems in unexpected ways, and it will "take years to be fully quantum-safe, if ever," cryptography expert warns....

item.title: Empty Attestations: OT Lacks the Tools for Cryptographic Readiness
